title: OMS in-toto Statement
description: JSON Schema for an in-toto Statement v1 carrying an OMS predicate. The statement structure follows https://github.com/in-toto/attestation/blob/main/spec/v1/statement.md — this schema adds the OMS-specific predicateType constraint and references the OMS predicate schema.

_type.description: in-toto Statement type URI (fixed by the in-toto spec).

subject.description: Subjects of the statement. For OMS, exactly one entry representing the model.

predicateType.description: OMS predicate type URI. This is the value that distinguishes an OMS statement from other in-toto predicates.

predicate.description: The OMS predicate body containing the file manifest and serialization metadata.

digest_set.description: A set of digests keyed by algorithm name (in-toto DigestSet).
